content.speakerText: Gotta run—thanks again for the awesome day!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，今天太棒了，谢谢！

options.text: Bye! Call me when you're free!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Bye! Call me when you're free!' 不仅礼貌道别，还重复了祝福并表达了未来联系的意愿，符合生日聚会结束时的社交礼仪。选项2虽礼貌但未回应祝福；选项3语气生硬，缺乏礼貌；选项4是回应感谢的常见语，但未主动道别或表达祝福，不完整。

content.speakerText: I should head out—this was such a wonderful celebration!
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了——这真是个美妙的庆祝！

options.text: Take care, and happy birthday once more!
Don't forget to send me the photos.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Take care, and happy birthday once more!' 完美结合了道别、关心和重复祝福，体现高情商社交礼仪。选项2缺乏主动祝福，语气随意；选项3转移话题，不合时宜；选项4语气自私，忽略场合。

content.speakerText: It's getting late—I had the best time tonight!
content.speakerTextCn: 时间不早了——我今晚玩得特别开心！

options.text: See ya! Thanks for making my birthday so special!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'See ya! Thanks for making my birthday so special!' 既礼貌道别，又回赠了真诚的感谢与祝福，符合双向社交礼仪。选项2只重复对方情绪，缺乏主动回应；选项3未道别；选项4虽关心安全，但未回应对方的情感表达，显得冷淡。

content.hint: 重复祝福时常用词，表示‘再次’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：happy birthday again（重复祝福）

content.template: I'd love to ___ you soon—thanks for everything!
content.hint: 表达‘保持联系’的常用动词，常与 'when you're free' 搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：call someone (when you're free)

content.template: See you ___! Thanks for such a wonderful party!
content.hint: 非正式道别中表示‘再见面’的高频词
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：see you again（非正式再见）

content.speakerText: Gotta run—thanks again for the awesome day!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，今天太棒了，谢谢！
expectedAnswers: Bye! Call me when you're free!
Take care, and happy birthday again!
See ya! You made my day so special—thanks!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌道别并回应了感谢与祝福
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'bye', 'take care', 'see ya' 或 'happy birthday again' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I should head out—this was such a wonderful celebration!
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了——这真是个美妙的庆祝！
expectedAnswers: Take care! Happy birthday once more!
See you soon! Thanks for inviting me—it was unforgettable!
Bye for now! I'm so glad I could be part of your special day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌道别并回赠祝福或感谢
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词和时态
表达自然度：语气真诚，不生硬或过度正式
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'take care', 'see you soon', 'happy birthday', 'thanks' 等关键词

content.speakerText: It's getting late—I had the best time tonight!
content.speakerTextCn: 时间不早了——我今晚玩得特别开心！
expectedAnswers: See ya! Thanks for making my birthday so special!
Gotta go too—have a safe trip, and thanks again!
Bye! Can't wait to celebrate with you next year!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然道别并回应情感表达
语言准确性：句式结构完整，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气温暖，符合朋友间轻松氛围
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'see ya', 'bye', 'thanks', 'special', 'celebrate' 等场景词汇
